---
title: "Spatial example figures — ATGC services page"
author: "ATGC / Hagay Ladany"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE,
                      dev = "svglite", fig.path = "figs/")
library(ggplot2)
library(svglite)
set.seed(11)
```

Synthetic / representative data only. A CosMx-style single-cell spatial map
(imaging-based, sub-cellular resolution) for the AtoMx tab on `index.html`:
annotated cells positioned in tissue, forming epithelial nests with an
immune-rich stroma — the kind of figure a CosMx / AtoMx run produces.

```{r cosmx, fig.width=6.6, fig.height=5.4}
ct_levels <- c("Epithelial / Tumor","Fibroblast","T cell",
               "Macrophage","Endothelial","B cell")
pal <- c("Epithelial / Tumor"="#d6453d","Fibroblast"="#4f93ce",
         "T cell"="#2bb673","Macrophage"="#f5a623",
         "Endothelial"="#8e5fc4","B cell"="#00a3b8")

field <- 100
blob <- function(cx, cy, n, sd) data.frame(x = rnorm(n, cx, sd),
                                            y = rnorm(n, cy, sd))

# Epithelial nests (dense glandular blobs).
nests <- data.frame(x = c(26,63,41,79,18,56),
                    y = c(70,76,39,47,30,17),
                    n = c(150,170,140,120,110,130), sd = c(6,6.5,5.5,5,5,6))
epi <- do.call(rbind, Map(function(x,y,n,sd){d<-blob(x,y,n,sd); d$ct<-"Epithelial / Tumor"; d},
                          nests$x, nests$y, nests$n, nests$sd))

# Fibroblast / stroma: uniform tissue background.
fib <- data.frame(x = runif(640,2,98), y = runif(640,2,98), ct = "Fibroblast")

# Immune cells infiltrate the rim of each nest (ring) plus scatter.
ring <- function(cx,cy,n,r){a<-runif(n,0,2*pi); rr<-r+rnorm(n,0,2.2)
  data.frame(x=cx+rr*cos(a), y=cy+rr*sin(a))}
tcell <- do.call(rbind, Map(function(x,y,sd){d<-ring(x,y,55,sd+4); d$ct<-"T cell"; d},
                            nests$x, nests$y, nests$sd))
tcell <- rbind(tcell, data.frame(x=runif(70,2,98), y=runif(70,2,98), ct="T cell"))
mac <- do.call(rbind, Map(function(x,y,sd){d<-ring(x,y,26,sd+6); d$ct<-"Macrophage"; d},
                          nests$x, nests$y, nests$sd))

# Endothelial: short vessel-like streaks.
vessel <- function(x0,y0,x1,y1,n){t<-seq(0,1,length.out=n)
  data.frame(x=x0+(x1-x0)*t+rnorm(n,0,1.4), y=y0+(y1-y0)*t+rnorm(n,0,1.4))}
endo <- rbind(vessel(10,55,48,60,40), vessel(50,20,85,30,38),
              vessel(35,85,70,80,34))
endo$ct <- "Endothelial"

# B cell: one dense aggregate (tertiary lymphoid structure).
bcell <- blob(88, 88, 90, 4); bcell$ct <- "B cell"

cells <- rbind(epi, fib, tcell, mac, endo, bcell)
cells <- cells[cells$x > 0 & cells$x < field & cells$y > 0 & cells$y < field, ]
cells$ct <- factor(cells$ct, levels = ct_levels)

ggplot(cells, aes(x, y, colour = ct)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.85, alpha = 0.9, stroke = 0) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = pal, name = NULL) +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3, alpha = 1))) +
  coord_equal(expand = FALSE) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        legend.key.height = unit(14, "pt"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.title = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(colour = "#d9e0e6", fill = NA),
        plot.margin = margin(4,4,4,4))
```
